uid.description: The user's unique ID, matches auth UID.

isVerified.description: Indicates if the user is a verified seller.

VehicleListing.title: VehicleListing
VehicleListing.description: Represents a vehicle listing in the Motores Zone application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the vehicle listing.

sellerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N VehicleListing)

make.description: The make of the vehicle (e.g., Toyota).

model.description: The model of the vehicle (e.g., Corolla).

year.description: The year the vehicle was manufactured.

priceUSD.description: The price of the vehicle in USD.

description.description: A detailed description of the vehicle.

imageUrls.description: URLs of the images associated with the vehicle listing.

summary.description: AI-generated summary of the vehicle listing.

ExchangeRate.title: ExchangeRate
ExchangeRate.description: Represents the official BCV exchange rate between USD and VES.

id.description: Unique identifier for the exchange rate entry.

rate.description: The exchange rate of USD to VES.

effectiveDate.description: The date when this exchange rate became effective.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. Each profile is a document keyed by the user's UID.

params.name: userId
params.description: The ID of the user who owns this profile.

definition.description: Stores vehicle listings. Includes 'sellerId' for authorization independence.

params.name: vehicleListingId
params.description: The unique ID of the vehicle listing.

definition.description: Stores exchange rates. No access control constraints specified, so no additional fields are required.

params.name: exchangeRateId
params.description: The unique ID of the exchange rate entry.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to securely manage user profiles, vehicle listings, and currency exchange rates. The structure prioritizes authorization independence and supports efficient querying.

*   **/users/{userId}:** Stores user profiles, keyed by the user's UID, ensuring strict ownership-based access control.
*   **/vehicle_listings/{vehicleListingId}:** Stores vehicle listings. The `sellerId` field enables querying listings by seller and enforcing ownership rules.
*   **/exchange_rates/{exchangeRateId}:** Stores global, read-only exchange rates.

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL):** The structure is designed to minimize the need for `get()` calls in security rules, thus ensuring authorization independence.

*   Vehicle listings have a `sellerId` field that directly links to the user who owns the listing. This removes the need to perform a `get()` operation to fetch the seller's ID from a separate document, satisfying denormalization for authorization.
